name: RateMyServer Reference Library
description: Curated internal metadata for using RateMyServer as a read-only external reference during manual triage.
license: External site terms apply; no dump or copied database is bundled.
permissionNote: Metadata-only provenance. No scraping, crawler, downloader, HTML dump, or internet dependency is implemented.
allowedUse: knowledge hints, manual comparison, external issue triage, progression evaluation context.
trustPolicy: External reference only. Not absolute truth. Local project, rAthena, and validated internal data have priority.
conflictPolicy: When conflicting with local data, prefer local/rAthena/project data and report the external source only as context or warning.
updatePolicy: Manual curated metadata update only. No automatic online sync in this version.
notes: Small sanitized examples only. No copied pages, no mass HTML, no external dump.
